review_text:
After trying it for a few days, one thing became obvious.
Messages leave late whenever I move indoors. That ended up shaping the whole experience.
evidence_sentence: Messages leave late whenever I move indoors.

review_text: Over several uses, the issue became clearer. The device becomes unreachable in common indoor areas. That became the main thing I noticed.
evidence_sentence: The device becomes unreachable in common indoor areas.

A short session drains far too much charge. It was hard to ignore after a few days.
